title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same features as Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use Ollama models as LLM/Chat/Embed endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with chat history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds local AI pair-programming via Ollama.

title: ollama-hub
summary: Community-curated registry of custom Modelfiles, adapters & tools for Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Unofficial Nim language client for Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-built Rust crate for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that proxies to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to run Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up ephemeral Ollama containers for CI testing.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel service provider + Facade for integrating Ollama models into PHP apps.

title: ollama-go
summary: Idiomatic Go SDK for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama functions to Claude & other MCP clients.

title: ollama-zsh
summary: Zsh plugin that adds aliases and autocompletion for the ollama CLI.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models in production pipelines.
